title: Declarations should not be empty
description: Declarations should not be emptyAnalyze your codeconsistency-conventionalmaintainabilitySuspiciousbased-on-misrabad-practiceWhy is this an issue?Empty declarations can mislead readers into thinking that the declaration was not finished or that some members were forgotten.Noncompliant code example; /* Noncompliant */ class myclass { ; /* Noncompliant */ };Compliant solutionclass myclass { private: int i; };Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since7.2©2025SonarSource Sàrl.
